title: Causal Telemetry, Event-Loop Responsiveness, Latency, Cache Value, and Capacity · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs causal telemetry, event-loop responsiveness, latency, cache value, and capacity from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for privacy-minimized interactive capacity report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Correlate command, operation generation, cache decision, request class, attempt, status class, duration, outcome, abort reason, and cleanup with bounded fields.
Count commands, outcomes, cache decisions, requests, bytes, aborts, queue depth, validation and persistence failures without unbounded labels.
Measure user-visible cold and warm percentiles plus event-loop delay under a declared scripted workload and environment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 1355 during a shared classroom network exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile bounded causal telemetry, percentile latency, event-loop responsiveness, cache value, and capacity; browser TypeScript must remain deterministic and free of Node or network effects; then inject one redirect, prototype-like key, terminal control, path, file, or signal failure and reject it safely. Browser code uses pure bounded runtime models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, Node readline, host streams, signals, files, package installs, handle and load claims, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Gate bounded heap, listeners, handles, queue, requests, bytes, output, latency, and shutdown while preserving exact behavior.

Inspect the Pokedex Ts Capacity Regression trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for gate bounded heap, listeners, handles, queue, requests, bytes, output, latency, and shutdown while preserving exact behavior.
